Program
  ProgramHead
    PROGRAM: program
    ID: allerrors
  DeclarePart
    TypeDecPart
      TypeDec
        TYPE: type
        TypeDecList
          ID: myint
          =: =
          TypeDef
            BaseType
              INTEGER: integer
          ;: ;
          TypeDecList
            ID: myint
            =: =
            TypeDef
              BaseType
                CHAR: char
            ;: ;
            TypeDecList
              ID: arr
              =: =
              TypeDef
                StructureType
                  ArrayType
                    ARRAY: array
                    [: [
                    INTC: 1
                    ..: ..
                    INTC: 5
                    ]: ]
                    OF: of
                    BaseType
                      INTEGER: integer
              ;: ;
              TypeDecList
                ID: rec
                =: =
                TypeDef
                  StructureType
                    RecType
                      RECORD: record
                      FieldDecList
                        BaseType
                          INTEGER: integer
                        IDList
                          ID: id
                        ;: ;
                        FieldDecList
                          BaseType
                            CHAR: char
                          IDList
                            ID: name
                          ;: ;
                      END: end
                ;: ;
    VarDecPart
      VarDec
        VAR: var
        VarDecList
          TypeDef
            BaseType
              INTEGER: integer
          VarIDList
            ID: x
            VarIDMore
              ,: ,
              VarIDList
                ID: y
          ;: ;
          VarDecList
            TypeDef
              BaseType
                CHAR: char
            VarIDList
              ID: c
            ;: ;
            VarDecList
              TypeDef
                ID: arr
              VarIDList
                ID: a
              ;: ;
              VarDecList
                TypeDef
                  ID: rec
                VarIDList
                  ID: r
                ;: ;
    ProcDecpart
      ProcDec
        PROCEDURE: procedure
        ID: foo
        (: (
        ParamList
          ParamDecList
            Param
              TypeDef
                BaseType
                  INTEGER: integer
              FormList
                ID: p
        ): )
        ;: ;
        DeclarePart
        ProcBody
          ProgramBody
            BEGIN: begin
            StmList
              Stm
                ID: p
                AssignmentRest
                  :=: :=
                  Exp
                    Term
                      Factor
                        Variable
                          ID: p
                    OtherTerm
                      AddOp
                        +: +
                      Exp
                        Term
                          Factor
                            INTC: 1
            END: end
  ProgramBody
    BEGIN: begin
    StmList
      Stm
        InputStm
          READ: read
          (: (
          ID: x
          ): )
      StmMore
        ;: ;
        StmList
          Stm
            InputStm
              READ: read
              (: (
              ID: notexist
              ): )
          StmMore
            ;: ;
            StmList
              Stm
                ID: x
                AssignmentRest
                  :=: :=
                  Exp
                    Term
                      Factor
                        Variable
                          ID: c
              StmMore
                ;: ;
                StmList
                  Stm
                    ID: c
                    AssignmentRest
                      :=: :=
                      Exp
                        Term
                          Factor
                            Variable
                              ID: x
                        OtherTerm
                          AddOp
                            +: +
                          Exp
                            Term
                              Factor
                                INTC: 1
                  StmMore
                    ;: ;
                    StmList
                      Stm
                        ID: y
                        AssignmentRest
                          :=: :=
                          Exp
                            Term
                              Factor
                                Variable
                                  ID: x
                            OtherTerm
                              AddOp
                                +: +
                              Exp
                                Term
                                  Factor
                                    Variable
                                      ID: c
                      StmMore
                        ;: ;
                        StmList
                          Stm
                            ID: myint
                            AssignmentRest
                              :=: :=
                              Exp
                                Term
                                  Factor
                                    INTC: 10
                          StmMore
                            ;: ;
                            StmList
                              Stm
                                ID: a
                                AssignmentRest
                                  VariMore
                                    [: [
                                    Exp
                                      Term
                                        Factor
                                          INTC: 1
                                    ]: ]
                                  :=: :=
                                  Exp
                                    Term
                                      Factor
                                        Variable
                                          ID: x
                              StmMore
                                ;: ;
                                StmList
                                  Stm
                                    ID: a
                                    AssignmentRest
                                      VariMore
                                        [: [
                                        Exp
                                          Term
                                            Factor
                                              Variable
                                                ID: c
                                        ]: ]
                                      :=: :=
                                      Exp
                                        Term
                                          Factor
                                            Variable
                                              ID: x
                                  StmMore
                                    ;: ;
                                    StmList
                                      Stm
                                        ID: x
                                        AssignmentRest
                                          VariMore
                                            [: [
                                            Exp
                                              Term
                                                Factor
                                                  INTC: 1
                                            ]: ]
                                          :=: :=
                                          Exp
                                            Term
                                              Factor
                                                INTC: 5
                                      StmMore
                                        ;: ;
                                        StmList
                                          Stm
                                            ID: r
                                            AssignmentRest
                                              VariMore
                                                .: .
                                                FieldVar
                                                  ID: id
                                              :=: :=
                                              Exp
                                                Term
                                                  Factor
                                                    Variable
                                                      ID: x
                                          StmMore
                                            ;: ;
                                            StmList
                                              Stm
                                                ID: r
                                                AssignmentRest
                                                  VariMore
                                                    .: .
                                                    FieldVar
                                                      ID: zzz
                                                  :=: :=
                                                  Exp
                                                    Term
                                                      Factor
                                                        INTC: 1
                                              StmMore
                                                ;: ;
                                                StmList
                                                  Stm
                                                    ID: r
                                                    AssignmentRest
                                                      VariMore
                                                        .: .
                                                        FieldVar
                                                          ID: name
                                                          FieldVarMore
                                                            [: [
                                                            Exp
                                                              Term
                                                                Factor
                                                                  INTC: 1
                                                            ]: ]
                                                      :=: :=
                                                      Exp
                                                        Term
                                                          Factor
                                                            INTC: 1
                                                  StmMore
                                                    ;: ;
                                                    StmList
                                                      Stm
                                                        ID: foo
                                                        CallStmRest
                                                          (: (
                                                          ActParamList
                                                            Exp
                                                              Term
                                                                Factor
                                                                  Variable
                                                                    ID: x
                                                          ): )
                                                      StmMore
                                                        ;: ;
                                                        StmList
                                                          Stm
                                                            ID: foo
                                                            CallStmRest
                                                              (: (
                                                              ActParamList
                                                                Exp
                                                                  Term
                                                                    Factor
                                                                      Variable
                                                                        ID: x
                                                                ActParamMore
                                                                  ,: ,
                                                                  ActParamList
                                                                    Exp
                                                                      Term
                                                                        Factor
                                                                          Variable
                                                                            ID: y
                                                              ): )
                                                          StmMore
                                                            ;: ;
                                                            StmList
                                                              Stm
                                                                ID: x
                                                                CallStmRest
                                                                  (: (
                                                                  ActParamList
                                                                    Exp
                                                                      Term
                                                                        Factor
                                                                          INTC: 1
                                                                  ): )
                                                              StmMore
                                                                ;: ;
                                                                StmList
                                                                  Stm
                                                                    ConditionalStm
                                                                      IF: if
                                                                      RelExp
                                                                        Exp
                                                                          Term
                                                                            Factor
                                                                              Variable
                                                                                ID: x
                                                                        OtherRelE
                                                                          CmpOp
                                                                            <: <
                                                                          Exp
                                                                            Term
                                                                              Factor
                                                                                Variable
                                                                                  ID: c
                                                                      THEN: then
                                                                      StmList
                                                                        Stm
                                                                          OutputStm
                                                                            WRITE: write
                                                                            (: (
                                                                            Exp
                                                                              Term
                                                                                Factor
                                                                                  Variable
                                                                                    ID: x
                                                                            ): )
                                                                      ELSE: else
                                                                      StmList
                                                                        Stm
                                                                          OutputStm
                                                                            WRITE: write
                                                                            (: (
                                                                            Exp
                                                                              Term
                                                                                Factor
                                                                                  Variable
                                                                                    ID: y
                                                                            ): )
                                                                      FI: fi
                                                                  StmMore
                                                                    ;: ;
                                                                    StmList
                                                                      Stm
                                                                        OutputStm
                                                                          WRITE: write
                                                                          (: (
                                                                          Exp
                                                                            Term
                                                                              Factor
                                                                                Variable
                                                                                  ID: x
                                                                          ): )
    END: end
  .: .
